---
name: 'Verify Change'
description: 'Independently verify an implementation against every approved requirement and acceptance criterion and produce reproducible evidence.'
argument-hint: 'Provide the specification, approved plan, revision, and environment.'
agent: 'Verify'
tools: ['read', 'search', 'execute']
---

# Verify Change

Build a complete REQ/AC coverage matrix, run the documented checks, probe
specified boundary and failure behavior, and produce a verification report with
a Pass, Pass with risk, Fail, or Blocked verdict. Do not edit implementation.
